SELECT s.series_name, SUM(f.volume) AS total_volume
FROM fact_sales_rank f
JOIN dim_series s ON s.series_id = f.series_id
JOIN dim_date d ON d.date_id = f.date_id
WHERE f.new_energy_type = 1 AND d.year = 2025
GROUP BY s.series_id, s.series_name
ORDER BY total_volume DESC LIMIT 10

rows.q: 2025年销量前十里有几款是增程
rows.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.series_id) AS count
FROM fact_sales_rank f
WHERE f.series_id IN (
  SELECT fs.series_id
  FROM fact_sales_rank fs
  JOIN dim_date d ON fs.date_id = d.date_id
  WHERE d.year = 2025
  GROUP BY fs.series_id
  ORDER BY SUM(fs.volume) DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
AND f.new_energy_type = 3

SELECT SUM(f.volume) AS total_volume
FROM fact_sales_rank f
JOIN dim_series s ON s.series_id = f.series_id
WHERE s.series_name LIKE '%唐DM%'
LIMIT 200

SELECT s.series_name, SUM(f.volume) AS total_volume
FROM fact_sales_rank f
JOIN dim_series s ON s.series_id = f.series_id
JOIN dim_brand b ON b.brand_id = s.brand_id
JOIN dim_date d ON d.date_id = f.date_id
WHERE b.brand_name LIKE '%比亚迪%' AND d.year = 2025
GROUP BY s.series_id, s.series_name
ORDER BY total_volume DESC
LIMIT 1

rows.q: 2025年纯电销量总和与插混销量总和
rows.pred_sql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN f.new_energy_type = 1 THEN f.volume ELSE 0 END) AS 纯电销量总和, SUM(CASE WHEN f.new_energy_type = 2 THEN f.volume ELSE 0 END) AS 插混销量总和 FROM fact_sales_rank f JOIN dim_date d ON d.date_id = f.date_id WHERE d.year = 2025
LIMIT 200

rows.q: 2025年12月排名上升的车系有哪些（当月排名优于上期）
rows.pred_sql:
SELECT s.series_name
FROM fact_sales_rank f
JOIN dim_series s ON s.series_id = f.series_id
JOIN dim_date d ON d.date_id = f.date_id
WHERE d.date_id = 202512 AND f.rank < f.last_rank
ORDER BY s.series_name
LIMIT 200
